name: Trajectory Within Bound (Lmax)
description: The execution trajectory length must stay within the certified maximum (Lmax). Bound shown as 50; set per deployment.
rationale: Szpruch maximum-trajectory-length guard. Exceeding Lmax indicates a runaway or looping workflow and is a Red halt; the bound is part of the certified DCE.

examples.passes: a 12-step trajectory under an Lmax of 50
examples.fails: a trajectory that exceeds the certified Lmax

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
